Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator

Class Mediator

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator.Mediator
public class Mediator extends Object
This class manages the creation of models and views and sends notifications for changes to mode and analysis types. This is a Singleton since only one mediator per application instance should exist. TODO: This is really 2 classes: a task manager and a message broker...

    • createPhaseSelectionListener

      protected Listener<PhaseSelectionMessage> createPhaseSelectionListener()

    • dropPhasePlotAnalysis

      public void dropPhasePlotAnalysis()
      Removes phase plot if exists.

    • createPhasePlot

      public void createPhasePlot()
      Create a phase plot, first asking for period and epoch. The series visibility map for the phase plot is taken from the currently visible plot (raw data or phase plot).

    • createPhasePlot

      public void createPhasePlot(double period, double epoch)
      Create a phase plot, given the period and epoch. The series visibility map for the phase plot is taken from the currently visible plot (raw data or phase plot).
      Parameters:
      period - The requested period of the phase plot.
      epoch - The epoch (first Julian Date) for the phase plot.

    • performPhasePlot

      public void performPhasePlot(double period, double epoch, Map<SeriesType,Boolean> seriesVisibilityMap)
      Common phase plot handler.
      Parameters:
      period - The requested period of the phase plot.
      epoch - The epoch (first Julian Date) for the phase plot.
      seriesVisibilityMap - A mapping from series number to visibility status.

    • changeAnalysisType

      public AnalysisType changeAnalysisType(AnalysisType analysisType)
      Change the analysis type. If the old and new types are the same, there will be no effect.
      Parameters:
      analysisType - The analysis type to change to.

      public void setPhasePlotStatusMessage()
      Set the status bar to display phase plot information.

      Returns:
      the analysisType

    • createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin

      public void createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin(ObservationSourcePluginBase obSourcePlugin)
      Creates and executes a background task to handle new-star-from-external-source-plugin.
      Parameters:
      obSourcePlugin - The plugin that will be used to obtain observations.

    • createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin

      public void createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin(ObservationSourcePluginBase obSourcePlugin, File file, boolean isAdditive) throws IOException, ObservationReadError
      Creates and executes a background task to handle new-star-from-external-source-plugin when a file is supplied.
      Parameters:
      obSourcePlugin - The plugin that will be used to obtain observations.
      file - The file to used as input.
      isAdditive - Is this an additive load?
      Throws:
      IOException
      ObservationReadError

    • createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin

      public void createObservationArtefactsFromObSourcePlugin(ObservationSourcePluginBase obSourcePlugin, URL url, boolean isAdditive) throws IOException, ObservationReadError
      Creates and executes a background task to handle new-star-from-external-source-plugin when a URL is supplied.
      Parameters:
      obSourcePlugin - The plugin that will be used to obtain observations.
      url - The URL to used as input.
      isAdditive - Is this an additive load?
      Throws:
      IOException
      ObservationReadError

    • createNewStarObservationArtefacts

      public void createNewStarObservationArtefacts(NewStarType newStarType, StarInfo starInfo, int obsArtefactProgressAmount, boolean addObs) throws ObservationReadError
      Create observation artefacts (models, GUI elements) on the assumption that a valid observation list and category map have already been created.
      Parameters:
      newStarType - The new star enum type.
      starInfo - Information about the star, e.g. name (designation), AUID (for AID), period, epoch, including observation retriever.
      obsArtefactProgressAmount - The amount the progress bar should be incremented by, a value corresponding to a portion of the overall task of which this is just a part.
      addObs - Should the observations be added to the existing loaded dataset?
      Throws:
      ObservationReadError

    • requestRA

      public RAInfo requestRA(RAInfo ra)

    • requestRA

      public RAInfo requestRA()

    • requestDec

      public DecInfo requestDec(DecInfo dec)

    • requestDec

      public DecInfo requestDec()

    • convertObsToHJD

      public int convertObsToHJD(List<ValidObservation> obs, RAInfo ra, DecInfo dec)
      Convert the specified observations to use HJD (if not already) rather than JD.
      Parameters:
      obs - The list of observations to be converted.
      ra - The RA for the object.
      dec - The Dec for the object.
      Returns:
      The number of observations converted.

    • createPhasePlotArtefacts

      public AnalysisTypeChangeMessage createPhasePlotArtefacts(double period, double epoch, Map<SeriesType,Boolean> seriesVisibilityMap) throws Exception
      Create phase plot artefacts, adding them to the analysis type map and returning this message.
      Parameters:
      period - The requested period of the phase plot.
      epoch - The epoch (first Julian Date) for the phase plot.
      seriesVisibilityMap - A mapping from series number to visibility status.
      Returns:
      An analysis type message consisting of phase plot artefacts.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • setPhasesForSeries

      public void setPhasesForSeries(SeriesType type, double epoch, double period)
      Set the phases for a particular series in the observation category map.
      Parameters:
      type - The series type of the observations whose phases are to be set.
      epoch - The epoch to use for the phase calculation.
      period - The period to use for the phase calculation.

    • waitForJobCompletion

      public void waitForJobCompletion()
      Block, waiting for a job to complete. We only want to block if there is a concurrent task in progress.

    • stopCurrentTask

      public void stopCurrentTask()
      Attempt to stop the current task.

    • clearCurrentTask

      public void clearCurrentTask()
      Clear the current task if not already cleared.

    • performPeriodAnalysis

      public void performPeriodAnalysis(PeriodAnalysisPluginBase plugin)
      Create a period analysis dialog after the analysis is done. It only makes sense to apply the observations to a single band as per this Q & A between Matt Templeton and I:
      DB: Like mean curve creation in VStar, should we only apply DC DFT to a single band, e.g. visual? MT: Yes, because of two things: 1) The different bands will have different mean values, and 2) The different bands will have different amplitudes or frequencies depending on what is physically causing the variation. Variability caused by temperature changes can have wildly different amplitudes in U or B versus Rc or Ic.

    • showPlotControlDialog

      public void showPlotControlDialog()
      Open the plot control dialog relevant to the current analysis mode.

    • showModelDialog

      public void showModelDialog()
      Open the model dialog.

    • showPhaseDialog

      public void showPhaseDialog()
      Open the phase plots dialog.

    • showFiltersDialog

      public void showFiltersDialog()
      Opens the filters dialog.

    • performModellingOperation

      public void performModellingOperation(ModelCreatorPluginBase plugin)
      Perform a plugin based modeling operation.

    • performModellingOperation

      public void performModellingOperation(IModel model)
      Perform a non-plugin based modeling operation.
      Parameters:
      model - The model object for this plugin whose execute() method can be invoked to create the model artifacts.

    • performObservationTransformationOperation

      public void performObservationTransformationOperation(ObservationTransformerPluginBase plugin)
      Perform an observation transformation plugin operation.

    • updatePlotsAndTables

      public void updatePlotsAndTables()
      Fire data model change events.
      This method should be called after observation plot or table model changes.

    • invokeTool

      public void invokeTool(ObservationToolPluginBase plugin)
      Invokes a tool plugin with the currently loaded observations.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The tool plugin to be invoked.

    • applyCustomFilterToCurrentObservations

      public void applyCustomFilterToCurrentObservations(CustomFilterPluginBase plugin)
      Apply the custom filter plug-in to the currently loaded observation set.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The tool plug-in to be invoked.

    • createFilterFromPlot

      public void createFilterFromPlot()
      Create a filter from the current plot view.

    • saveCurrentMode

      public void saveCurrentMode(Component parent)
      Save the artefact corresponding to the current viewMode.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent component to be used in dialogs.

    • saveCurrentPlotToFile

      public void saveCurrentPlotToFile(File file, int width, int height)
      Save the current plot (as a PNG) to the specified file.
      Used by VStar scripting API.
      Parameters:
      path - The file to write the PNG image to.
      width - The desired width of the image.
      height - The desired height of the image.

    • saveObsListToFile

      public void saveObsListToFile(Component parent, ObservationSinkPluginBase plugin, File path, String delimiter)
      Save observation list to a file in a separate thread. Note that we want to save just those observations that are in view in the observation list currently. Used by the VStar Scripting API.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent component to be used in dialogs.
      plugin - The observation sink plugin.
      path - The path of the file to save to.
      delimiter - The delimiter between data items.

    • saveSyntheticObsListToFile

      public void saveSyntheticObsListToFile(Component parent, ObservationSinkPluginBase plugin, ViewModeType mode, File path, String delimiter)
      Save synthetic observation list (means, model, residuals) to a file in a separate thread.
      Used by VStar scripting API.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent component to be used in dialogs.
      plugin - The observation sink plugin.
      mode - The current synthetic view mode.
      path - The path of the file to save to.
      delimiter - The delimiter between data items.

    • printCurrentMode

      public void printCurrentMode(Component parent)
      Print the artefact corresponding to the current mode.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent component to be used by an error dialog.

    • showObservationDetails

      public void showObservationDetails()
      Show the details of the currently selected observation in the current view mode (plot or table).

    • updateChartProperties

      public void updateChartProperties()
      Updates properties for charts (light curve, phase plot)

    • reportDiscrepantObservation

      public void reportDiscrepantObservation(ValidObservation ob, JDialog dialog) throws AuthenticationError, CancellationException, ConnectionException
      Report a discrepant observation to AAVSO (if the dataset was AID-downloaded).
      Parameters:
      ob - The observation to be reported.
      dialog - A parent dialog to set non-visible and dispose. May be null.
      Throws:
      AuthenticationError
      CancellationException
      ConnectionException

    • quit

      public void quit()
      Exit VStar.

    • getParentDialog

      public static JDialog getParentDialog(Component c)

    • getParentDialogName

      public static String getParentDialogName(Component c)

    • isMsgForDialog
